[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000110 3
1 01100000 2
2 01100000 2
3 00000000 a
4 01000100 2
5 00000010 1
6 01000110 3
7 00000010 1

01 10 00100100 2
12 21 11010110 5
23 32 01100100 3
34 43 11010101 5
45 54 01001100 3
56 65 00111001 4
67 76 00011110 4
70 07 00101000 2

02 20 11110010 5
13 31 10110010 4
24 42 10110001 4
35 53 10011001 4
46 64 01110101 5
57 75 00100111 4
60 06 00110110 4
71 17 00001100 2

03 30 10010110 4
14 41 01100111 5
25 52 11111101 7
36 63 10100000 2
47 74 01101011 5
50 05 00001111 4
61 16 00010010 2
72 27 11011010 5

04 40 01000011 3
15 51 00101011 4
26 62 11000100 3
37 73 10111110 6
